batch_summary: In the living room, Chandler frantically asks Ross and Rachel for help getting a chick out of a VCR. Later, in her bedroom, Rachel asks Ross to help apply her makeup. Ross playfully warms up and begins applying eyeshadow, leading to a lighthearted debate about her look and his desire to make her look "sophisticated." Afterward, at the coffee shop, Monica excitedly tells Phoebe that she is going to check out a restaurant with Pete later that evening.

Despite Ross pointing out their intimate past, Rachel insists their breakup makes it weird now, leading to playful banter where Ross jokes he can visualize her naked whenever he closes his eyes.
